χ-ledger telescope: one-point-bump coordinate lemmas discharging chi_add_eq_residueDeg per step
Harvest separatedness + Pic⁰ finite-type/tangent-space helpers from FGA PR #1
ℙ¹ chart overlap = D(x)=D(y): the Proj-side basic-open identity and its toProjInt pullback

Register CechComparisonGate: proves the constant-k sheaf category is Grothendieck-abelian hence has enough injectives hence HasExt.{u}/{u+1}, discharging 2 of the 3 genus-finiteness gates. Module.Finite k H^1(C,O_C) now reduces to exactly two instances: P1HasLaurentChartData k and HasCechToHModuleIso for the 2-affine cover (module_finite_hModule_one_of_finiteMapToP1_of_cechGate). Full build green (8686 jobs).
Picard/01CB: reusable quasi-coherence criterion from basic-open section localization

Adelic gate 4: 2-affine-cover pieces affine + per-piece HModule' vanishing; genus-finiteness capstone under the honest gate set, reducing the Cech-to-derived comparison to affine Serre vanishing IsAffineHModuleVanishing (with the Ext.{u}/Ext.{u+1} chgUniv assembly note)

Wave-9 reconcile: register orphaned modules (Adelic.CechAcyclicInstance, Picard.InvertibleSectionLocalization) in the root import list; repair the two whnf-timeout proofs in InvertibleSectionLocalization (twistedSMul smul-compatibility) — root cause was the bare name map_smul resolving to Scheme.Modules.map_smul inside the namespace, sending erw's defeq matcher into the sheafification stack; qualified to _root_.map_smul + a general presheaf-of-modules Module bridge instance, builds at default heartbeats
